data.title: Golden Shield Resources Announces Strategic Board and Management Changes
data.description:
The latest update is out from Golden Shield Resources Inc. ( (TSE:GSRI) ).

Golden Shield Resources Inc. has announced significant changes to its board and management team. Zayn Kalyan, an experienced investment banker and business development executive, joins the Board of Directors, while Stephanie Sharma takes on the role of Corporate Secretary. The company also acknowledges the resignations of Alison M. Redford KC from the board and Grant Tanaka as CFO, with Leo Hathaway stepping in as Interim CFO. These changes are expected to bring new expertise and strategic direction to the company as it continues to develop its mineral projects.

More about Golden Shield Resources Inc.

Golden Shield Resources Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral projects. The company controls the Marudi Mountain Property, a 5,457-hectare site located in the Rupununi District of southwestern Guyana.

YTD Price Performance: 75.00%

Average Trading Volume: 209,609

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$2.31M

data.title: Q Precious & Battery Metals Launches European Marketing Campaign
data.description:
The latest update is out from Q Precious & Battery Metals ( (TSE:QMET) ).

Q Precious & Battery Metals Corp. has engaged Aktiencheck.de AG for a European marketing awareness program to boost its visibility among active investors. This initiative, costing 25,000 euros, includes editorial write-ups and targeted distribution through various channels, running for up to three months. The move is expected to strengthen the company’s market positioning and investor relations.

More about Q Precious & Battery Metals

Q Precious & Battery Metals Corp. operates in the precious and battery metals industry, focusing on the exploration and development of these critical resources. The company aims to enhance its market presence and investor engagement through strategic marketing initiatives.

data.title: Cheche Group Reports Strong 2024 Financial Results with NEV Market Growth
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Cheche Group ( (CCG) ).

Cheche Group Inc. reported its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, showing significant growth in revenues and a substantial reduction in losses. The company’s strategic focus on the NEV market has resulted in a 171% increase in written premiums from NEV-related business, highlighting its strong market positioning and operational efficiency. This growth is supported by partnerships with major NEV manufacturers, which have led to a significant increase in embedded policies and corresponding premiums. The company’s ability to balance expansion with cost management is evident in the reduction of operating and net losses, positioning Cheche as a leader in the Insurtech sector.

More about Cheche Group

Cheche Group Inc. is a leading auto insurance technology platform based in China, focusing on providing innovative insurance solutions, particularly in the New Energy Vehicle (NEV) sector. The company leverages technological advancements to enhance customer experiences and drive growth in the auto insurance market.

YTD Price Performance: 34.09%

Average Trading Volume: 605,634

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $89.38M

data.title: Rigetti Computing Announces Board of Directors Changes
data.description:
The latest update is out from Rigetti Computing ( (RGTI) ).

Rigetti Computing announced that Cathy McCarthy will not seek re-election as a Class III director at the company’s 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. To maintain balance among board classes, Ray O. Johnson, currently a Class I director, has been nominated to stand for election as a Class III director, with his resignation from Class I contingent upon his election.

data.title: Saker Aviation Delays Yearly Report Filing
data.description:
Saker Aviation Services ( (SKAS) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Saker Aviation Services, Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The delay is primarily due to recent changes in management and the Board of Directors, which have created time constraints in compiling and reviewing the necessary information. The company expects to file the report no later than 15 days after the original due date. There are no anticipated significant changes in financial results from the previous fiscal year. The notification was signed by William Wachtel, the President and CEO, who assured ongoing compliance efforts.

More about Saker Aviation Services

data.title: Banco Santander-Chile Successfully Places Bonds in Local Market
data.description:
An announcement from Banco Santander Chile ( (BSAC) ) is now available.

On March 28, 2025, Banco Santander-Chile announced the successful placement of dematerialized and bearer bonds in the local market. The bonds, registered under the Securities Registry of the CMF, include Series AA-6 and Series AA-12, with maturities in 2037 and 2033 respectively, and average placement rates of 3.15% and 3.13%. This strategic move is expected to strengthen the bank’s financial position and enhance its market presence.

More about Banco Santander Chile

Banco Santander-Chile is a prominent financial institution in Chile, operating in the banking industry. It provides a wide range of financial services including retail and commercial banking, and is focused on serving both individual and corporate clients in the Chilean market.

data.title: Companhia Siderúrgica Nacional’s 2024 Financial Statements Audited
data.description:
Companhia Siderúrgica Nacional ( (SID) ) has issued an update.

Companhia Siderúrgica Nacional released its audited financial statements for the year ending December 31, 2024, confirming a fair presentation of its financial position in accordance with Brazilian and international standards. The audit highlighted the realization of deferred tax assets as a key matter, emphasizing the critical judgments involved in projecting future taxable income, which could impact financial outcomes and necessitate reassessment of asset recoverability.

More about Companhia Siderúrgica Nacional

Companhia Siderúrgica Nacional is a prominent player in the steel industry, primarily engaged in the production and distribution of steel products. The company focuses on both domestic and international markets, leveraging its strategic position in Brazil to cater to diverse industrial needs.

data.title: Phenom Resources Applauds Executive Order Boosting U.S. Mineral Production
data.description:
Phenom Resources Corp ( (TSE:PHNM) ) has provided an update.

Phenom Resources Corp. has informed its shareholders about a significant Executive Order signed by President Trump aimed at boosting American mineral production. This order is expected to positively impact the mineral sector by reducing regulatory hurdles and promoting domestic production, which could expedite Phenom’s drilling activities on its Dobbin and King Solomon gold projects.

More about Phenom Resources Corp

Phenom Resources Corp. is a company with a 100% interest in the Carlin Gold-Vanadium Project, which includes North America’s largest and highest-grade primary vanadium resource. The company is also progressing with drill permit applications for its Dobbin and King Solomon Gold Projects.

data.title: Medigene AG Reports Significant Share Capital Loss and Cash Runway Adjustment
data.description:
Medigene ( (DE:MDG1) ) just unveiled an update.

Medigene AG has announced a significant financial update, revealing a loss of more than half of its share capital, necessitating an Extraordinary General Meeting to formally report this to shareholders. Additionally, the company has adjusted its cash runway, moving it from July 2025 to May 2025, due to unmet milestone payments and income from contractual obligations. Despite these challenges, Medigene remains committed to maintaining its 2024 financial guidance for R&D expenses and revenues, and is actively seeking additional financing to sustain operations.

More about Medigene

Medigene AG is a biotechnology company based in Planegg/Martinsried, Germany. It focuses on the development of innovative immunotherapies for the treatment of cancer, leveraging its expertise in T cell receptor (TCR) technology.

YTD Price Performance: 50.40%

Average Trading Volume: 583

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Smart Capital S.p.A. Reports Strong 2024 Financial Growth and Successful Market Listing
data.description:
The latest update is out from Smart Capital S.P.A. ( (IT:SMCAP) ).

Smart Capital S.p.A. reported significant growth in its financial performance for 2024, with a 111% increase in net results attributable to the parent company compared to the previous year. The company successfully listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market, raising approximately 9 million euros and expanding its shareholder base to include over 100 entrepreneurial families and institutional investors. This strategic move, along with successful exits from several investments, has strengthened Smart Capital’s market position and provided substantial returns to its shareholders.

More about Smart Capital S.P.A.

Smart Capital S.p.A. is a permanent capital industrial holding company specializing in Private Equity and Private Investments in Public Equity. The company focuses on investing in small and medium-sized enterprises with strong growth potential, and it operates within the financial services industry.
